text:
Problematic Pressure Ulcer This field indicates the stage of the most problematic unhealed (observable) pressure ulcer. 01 = Stage I
02 = Stage II
03 = Stage III
04 = Stage IV
NA = NA - Patient has no pressure ulcers or no stageable pressure ulcers CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1330_STAS_ULCR_PRSNT M1330 Stasis Ulcer Present This field indicates whether the patient has a stasis ulcer. 00 = No
01 = Yes, patient has BOTH observable and unobservable stasis ulcers.
02 = Yes, patient has observable stasis
